description: Style Note Get your little one up and about in this pair of leggings from gini and jony. Team them with a white tee and comfy footwear when you take her out. The blended fabric will keep her feeling fresh and comfortable all day. Product Details Pink leggings with an elasticated waistband and crystal embellishment above the left hem Material and care 95% viscose and 5% lycra Machine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent Do not bleach or soak Warm iron only
